text:
Market today: Mixed signals. Retail sales show economic strength, but the Fed faces an inflation test. Crucially, a critic warns of an "AI bubble" and "Lehman Bros. moment" for tech, directly impacting your concentrated book.

Your holdings: SOXL (-39.74%) and SPAL (-36.62%) are leveraged and showing deep losses, needing urgent review. SMH (-8.96%) and QQQI (-1.68%) are also flagged for trimming. Margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on any Fed commentary regarding inflation and market reaction to the AI bubble warning.

Bottom line: Risk management is paramount given your tech concentration, margin use, and leveraged positions.
plays: SOXL: "SELL" status with a -39.74% loss. Re-evaluate this leveraged position, consider a tighter stop or reducing exposure.
SPAL: "NEW" but -36.62% loss and leveraged. Monitor closely and consider risk reduction given its volatility.
SMH: "TRIM" status with -8.96% loss. Prepare to trim if it approaches its 540 stop or if tech sentiment worsens.
